availability.p: © Duke Databank of Documentary Papyri. This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 3.0 License.

revisionDesc.change: Vote - AcceptText - See Krueger's comments + change language to <S=.cop + add the second disclaimer “Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible.” since a picture of the verso is available. lin6=> <:ⲙⲡⲉⲩ|alt|ⲙⲡⲉϥ:>; lin11=> <:ϩⲉⲛ.2[.?]=PN L. Vanderheyden (photograph)|ed|ϩⲉⲛ.1[.?]:>; lin12=> ⲛⲅⲧⲛⲛⲟⲟⲩⲥⲟⲩ ⲛⲧⲟⲟⲧϥ (add supralinear strokes); add vac.1 before ⲁⲣⲓ; lin13=> ⲛⲅⲣⲡ (add supralinear stroke); ϩⲁϩⲧⲛ (add supralinear stroke); 14. ϩⲛ (add supralinear stroke). I agree with Krueger's comments on the expected phraseology in both lin12 and 14. The rest of the text is fine to me.

Vote - AcceptText - Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.
lin4=> ⲧ<#ⲥⲩⲛⲧⲉ=2#> (move the article outside the number encoding); ⲁ̣[ⲩⲱ] lin5=> ⲉⲙⲁ[ⲧⲉ] lin6=> ⲙⲡⲉⲩ<:καταφρονεῖν=grc|reg|ⲕⲁⲧⲁⲫⲣⲟⲛⲉⲓ:> (move ⲉⲩ outside loanword encoding) lin8=> ⲙⲛ ⲑⲁⲓⲧⲉ (add space); ⲁⲩ[ⲱ] lin9=> ϯ<#ⲥⲩⲛⲧⲉ=2#> (encode number) lin12=> <:ⲁⲣⲓ ⲡ[ⲛⲁ] [.?]=PN F. Krueger (common phraseology)|ed|ⲁⲣⲓ ⲡ[.?]:> lin13=> <:[ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ]14. ϩⲛ ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ=PN F. Krueger (common phraseology)|ed|[.?]14. ϩⲛ ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ:>
Submit - Entered text according to O.Crum 100. I think I got all the Greek loan words. Added number mark up in lin4. Please check carefully that I got these right.

div.p: Where diacritical signs or supralinear strokes above letters are present on the original, these were not recorded in Crum's edition. Since Crum in his later editions did indicate these marks, we have chosen to add them tacitly where access to an image has made this possible. Note that the presentation of the edition of O.Crum here represents a synthesis of Crum's original handwritten edition with his own corrections that he later supplied in the notes to his translations.

div.ab:
ⲧⲁⲁⲥ
ⲡⲁⲩⲗⲟⲥ ϩⲓⲧⲛ ϩⲏⲗⲓⲁⲥ
ⲉⲓⲧⲛⲛⲟⲟⲩ ⲡⲁⲩⲗⲟⲥ
ⲉⲧⲃⲉ ⲧⲥⲩⲛⲧⲉ ⲛλῶδιξⲗⲱⲧⲓⲝ ⲁⲩⲱ
ⲁⲓεὐχαριστεῖνⲉⲩⲭⲁⲣⲓⲥⲧⲁ ⲛⲧⲟⲧⲕ ⲉⲙⲁⲧⲉ
ⲙⲡⲉⲩⲙⲡⲉϥκαταφρονεῖνⲕⲁⲧⲁⲫⲣⲟⲛⲉⲓ ϯⲛⲟⲩ ⲁⲣⲓ
ⲁⲓⲧⲛⲛⲟⲟⲩϥ ⲛⲁⲕ ⲟⲩⲱϣ ⲛⲅ
ⲛⲡⲣⲏϣ ⲛⲁⲓ ⲙⲛ ⲑⲁⲓⲧⲉ ⲕⲁⲙⲏ ⲁⲩⲱ
πανάριονⲡⲁⲛⲁⲣⲉ ⲕⲛⲁϩⲉ ⲉϯⲥⲩⲛⲧⲉ ⲛⲕ
ⲕⲓϩⲉⲉϩⲉⲛⲁϥⲧⲃⲣ

ⲕⲉⲫⲩⲁ ⲉⲥϫⲓⲕⲓ ϩⲉⲛϩⲉⲛ
ⲛⲅⲧⲛⲛⲟⲟⲩⲥⲟⲩ ⲛⲧⲟⲟⲧϥ ⲁⲣⲓ ⲡⲛⲁ ⲁⲣⲓ ⲡ
ⲉⲓ ⲉϩⲟⲩⲛ ⲛⲅⲣⲡπάσχαⲡⲁⲥⲭⲁ ϩⲁϩⲧⲛ ϯ ⲟⲩϫⲁⲓ
ϩⲛ ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ
ϩⲛ ⲡϫⲟⲉⲓⲥ
